header_title.description: App name shown in the header. A recipe discovery app for world cuisines.

header_subtitle.description: Tagline shown below the app name in the header.

home_page_hero_title.description: Main heading on the home page hero section.

home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Subtitle text displayed under the hero heading on the home page.

home_page_featured_title.description: Section heading displayed above the recipe card grid.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Cooking time label on a recipe card. {minutes} is replaced with the number of minutes.

recipe_card_difficulty.description: Label displayed before the difficulty level on a recipe card.

recipe_card_easy.description: Difficulty level label indicating an easy recipe.

recipe_card_medium.description: Difficulty level label indicating a moderately difficult recipe.

recipe_card_hard.description: Difficulty level label indicating a difficult recipe.

recipe_card_ramen_name.description: Name of the Tonkotsu Ramen recipe.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Mikwenimad ishkode-mshkikiwin miinawaa mizhinawewin chashu, mkadewin minose, miinawaa wiisiniwinag odaya.
recipe_card_ramen_description.description: Description of the Tonkotsu Ramen recipe.

recipe_card_margherita_name.description: Name of the Margherita Pizza recipe.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: Neapolitan pizza giiwedinong San Marzano minose, fresh mozzarella, miinawaa basil.
recipe_card_margherita_description.description: Description of the Margherita Pizza recipe.

recipe_card_tacos_name.description: Name of the Tacos al Pastor recipe.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Minose pork tacos miinawaa pineapple, cilantro, miinawaa onion giiwedinong corn tortillas.
recipe_card_tacos_description.description: Description of the Tacos al Pastor recipe.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_name.description: Name of the Butter Chicken recipe.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Mino-giizhigad chicken ishkode-mshkikiwin tomato miinawaa butter sauce miinawaa odaminwaag.
recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.description: Description of the Butter Chicken recipe.

recipe_card_pad_thai_name.description: Name of the Pad Thai recipe.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: Mshkikiwinag rice noodles miinawaa shrimp, tofu, peanuts, miinawaa tamarind sauce.
recipe_card_pad_thai_description.description: Description of the Pad Thai recipe.

recipe_card_crepes_name.description: Name of the French Crepes recipe.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Thin, delicate crepes minose Nutella, fresh strawberries, miinawaa whipped cream.
recipe_card_crepes_description.description: Description of the French Crepes recipe.
